agent_output: {"integration_assessment":{"component_interactions":[{"from":"inventory-sync-service","to":"external-inventory-api","status":"risk","issue":"No timeout configured on outbound HTTP call. A hung upstream connection will block the sync indefinitely, potentially causing goroutine/thread leaks or overlapping sync cycles."},{"from":"inventory-sync-service","to":"local-database","status":"risk","issue":"If the external API returns stale or malformed data due to a partial outage, the service will blindly overwrite local stock counts with incorrect values. No validation or sanity-check layer exists between ingest and write."},{"from":"cron-scheduler","to":"inventory-sync-service","status":"risk","issue":"5-minute fixed interval with no guard against overlapping runs. If a sync takes longer than 5 minutes (e.g., hung API call with no timeout), a second sync will start concurrently, risking duplicate writes or race conditions on the database."}],"contract_compliance":"Unknown — no schema validation on the external API response. If the upstream changes its payload shape, the service will fail silently or corrupt local data.","data_flow_integrity":"Weak — stock counts flow from external API to local DB with no intermediate validation, no idempotency guarantees, and no checksumming. A partial sync (e.g., network drop mid-page) could leave the database in an inconsistent state."},"observability_review":{"logging":{"coverage":"gaps","gaps":["Only two log lines exist (success and failure). No structured logging — using console.log with string concatenation instead of JSON-structured log entries.","No log of sync duration, number of records processed, or records changed.","No correlation ID or request ID to trace a specific sync run end-to-end.","Error logging captures only err.message, discarding the stack trace, error code, and upstream HTTP status.","No logging at sync-start, making it impossible to distinguish 'sync never started' from 'sync started but hung'."]},"metrics":{"coverage":"missing","gaps":["No sync_duration_seconds histogram — cannot alert on degrading upstream performance.","No sync_success_total / sync_failure_total counters — cannot compute success rate or trigger failure-rate alerts.","No records_synced gauge — cannot detect zero-record syncs or sudden drops in inventory coverage.","No inflight_syncs gauge — cannot detect overlapping runs.","No external_api_latency_seconds histogram — cannot isolate upstream vs local DB performance issues."]},"tracing":{"coverage":"missing","gaps":["No distributed tracing spans for the outbound API call or database write phases.","No trace context propagation — impossible to correlate this service's behavior with upstream or downstream systems."]},"debugging_capability":"Poor. An on-call engineer at 3am would see only 'sync failed: connection refused' in logs with no context about which sync run, how many retries were attempted, what the upstream returned, or how long the call took. Debugging would require SSH-ing into the container and adding ad-hoc logging."},"resilience_assessment":{"failure_modes":[{"scenario":"External inventory API is completely down","handling":"unhandled","recommendation":"Add retry with exponential backoff (3 attempts, base 2s, jitter). Log each retry attempt with attempt number and wait duration. After exhausting retries, emit a sync_failure metric and log at ERROR level with full context."},{"scenario":"External inventory API responds but is extremely slow (>30s)","handling":"unhandled","recommendation":"Add a 10-second timeout on the outbound HTTP call. This prevents thread/connection exhaustion and ensures sync runs complete well within the 5-minute window."},{"scenario":"External inventory API returns 200 but with empty or malformed payload","handling":"unhandled","recommendation":"Validate response schema before writing to DB. If record count drops below a configurable threshold (e.g., 80% of previous sync count), treat as anomalous and skip the write. Log a warning."},{"scenario":"Database is unreachable during write phase","handling":"partial","recommendation":"The generic catch block will log the error, but there is no distinction between API failures and DB failures. Separate error handling for each phase so alerts can be routed correctly."},{"scenario":"Overlapping sync runs due to previous run exceeding 5-minute interval","handling":"unhandled","recommendation":"Implement a mutex or leader-lock so only one sync runs at a time. If a previous run is still in progress, skip the current tick and log a warning with a metric increment."},{"scenario":"Upstream API returns incorrect stock counts (data corruption)","handling":"unhandled","recommendation":"Implement a sanity check: if any single SKU's stock changes by more than a configurable percentage (e.g., 90%) in one sync, flag it for review rather than blindly writing. This prevents a upstream bug from zeroing out inventory."}],"retry_config":"None. Must add: 3 retries, exponential backoff starting at 2s, with jitter. Total retry window must stay under 60s to avoid overlapping with next sync.","timeout_config":"None. Must add: 10s connection timeout, 10s read timeout on the outbound HTTP client.","circuit_breakers":"None. Recommended for future iteration: after 5 consecutive sync failures, open circuit for 15 minutes and emit a critical alert. Not a hard blocker for initial launch if retries and timeouts are added.","graceful_degradation":"None. If the external API is down, local stock counts go stale with no signal to consumers. Recommend: track last_successful_sync timestamp in DB or cache; expose it via health endpoint so downstream systems can decide whether to trust current stock data."},"operational_readiness":{"deployment_ready":false,"rollback_capable":true,"rollback_plan":"Re-deploy previous container image. No database migrations in this release, so rollback is a clean image swap with no data concerns.","monitoring_coverage":"None. No metrics, no health endpoint, no alerting. The team will not know this service is failing until customers report incorrect stock levels.","on_call_documentation":"Missing. No runbook exists for: what to do when sync fails, how to manually trigger a sync, how to verify sync integrity, or how to check upstream API health.","new_infrastructure_required":{"new_env_vars":["INVENTORY_API_TIMEOUT_MS — outbound call timeout","SYNC_RETRY_MAX_ATTEMPTS — retry ceiling","SYNC_RETRY_BASE_DELAY_MS — backoff base"],"new_services":[],"new_queues_topics":[],"config_changes":["Metrics endpoint configuration (e.g., Prometheus scrape target registration)","Health check endpoint registration in load balancer or orchestrator"],"infra_provisioning":["Prometheus scrape target or equivalent metrics collection for the new service","Alert rules for sync_failure_rate > threshold and last_successful_sync age"]},"database_safety":{"has_migrations":false,"reversible":true,"data_preserving":true,"large_table_impact":false,"details":"No schema changes in this release. Stock count updates are overwrites to existing rows. Rollback to previous image stops future syncs but does not corrupt data."},"verdict":"NOT READY"},"escalations":[{"type":"missing_observability","issue":"Zero metrics instrumentation and no health endpoint","reason":"Without metrics or a health check, there is no way to know if this service is functioning. The team will discover outages only when customers report stale inventory. This is not operable.","routed_to":"Coach K"},{"type":"infrastructure_gap","issue":"No timeout or retry logic on external API calls","reason":"A single hung upstream connection can block the sync indefinitely, cause overlapping runs, and silently stale-out the entire inventory dataset. This is a production availability risk that requires code changes before shipping.","routed_to":"Coach K"},{"type":"missing_observability","issue":"No runbook or on-call documentation","reason":"An on-call engineer has no guide for diagnosing sync failures, verifying data integrity, or manually recovering. Combined with minimal logging, this makes 3am incidents significantly more expensive.","routed_to":"Coach K"}],"confidence":{"level":90,"high_confidence_areas":["Resilience gaps — timeout, retry, and circuit breaker absence is clear from the description","Observability gaps — console.log-only logging with no metrics or tracing is definitively insufficient","Rollback safety — no migrations means clean image rollback"],"low_confidence_areas":["Exact overlapping-run behavior — depends on scheduler implementation details not provided","Database write semantics — unclear if writes are idempotent upserts or blind inserts"],"assumptions":["Service runs as a single instance (no distributed coordination needed for leader election)","The external inventory API is HTTP-based","The local database supports upsert or equivalent idempotent write patterns","No other service depends on sync completion events (no downstream fanout)"]}}
